quizQuestion:
Espero que {___} feliz.
(I hope you're happy.)
explanation: seas — present subjunctive of ser (tú). ser is highly irregular: sea, seas, sea, seamos, seáis, sean. No resemblance to the present indicative (soy, eres...). After espero que, subjunctive required.

quizQuestion:
Quiero que {___} perfecto.
(I want it to be perfect.)
sentenceTranslation: I want it to be perfect.
explanation: sea — present subjunctive of ser (él/ella/usted and yo). Quiero que requires subjunctive. ser subjunctive: sea, seas, sea, seamos, seáis, sean. Completely irregular — no stem from infinitive or indicative forms.

quizQuestion:
Es importante que {___} honestos.
(It's important that we be honest.)
sentenceTranslation: It's important that we be honest.
explanation: seamos — present subjunctive of ser (nosotros). Es importante que triggers subjunctive. Full paradigm: sea, seas, sea, seamos, seáis, sean.

quizQuestion:
Espero que {___} bien.
(I hope you're well.)
explanation: estés — present subjunctive of estar (tú). estar subjunctive: esté, estés, esté, estemos, estéis, estén. Note the accent marks on all forms (estÉ, estÉS...). After espero que, subjunctive required.

quizQuestion:
Es importante que {___} aquí a las ocho.
(It's important that you be here at eight.)
sentenceTranslation: It's important that you be here at eight.
explanation: esté — present subjunctive of estar (él/ella/usted/yo). Note: the written accent distinguishes esté (subjunctive) from este (demonstrative adjective). Es importante que requires subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Quiero que {___} cuidado.
(I want you to be careful.)
sentenceTranslation: I want you to be careful.
explanation: tengas — present subjunctive of tener (tú). Tener is irregular: tenga, tengas, tenga, tengamos, tengáis, tengan. The stem is teng- (same as yo present indicative tengo → drop -o, add subjunctive endings).

quizQuestion:
Es importante que {___} paciencia.
(It's important that you have patience.)
sentenceTranslation: It's important that you have patience.
explanation: tenga — present subjunctive of tener (él/ella/usted/yo). Pattern: take yo present indicative tengo → drop -o → teng- → add subjunctive vowel: tenga, tengas, tenga, tengamos, tengáis, tengan.

quizQuestion:
Quiero que {___} los deberes.
(I want you to do your homework.)
sentenceTranslation: I want you to do your homework.
explanation: hagas — present subjunctive of hacer (tú). hago (yo present) → drop -o → hag- + subjunctive: haga, hagas, haga, hagamos, hagáis, hagan. Quiero que requires subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Es necesario que {___} algo.
(It's necessary that we do something.)
sentenceTranslation: It's necessary that we do something.
explanation: haga — present subjunctive of hacer (él/ella/usted/yo). Es necesario que triggers subjunctive. haga is also used as usted affirmative imperative: ¡Hágalo! (Do it!).

quizQuestion:
Cuando {___} a Madrid, visítame.
(When you go to Madrid, visit me.)
sentenceTranslation: When you go to Madrid, visit me.
explanation: vayas — present subjunctive of ir (tú). ir is completely irregular: vaya, vayas, vaya, vayamos, vayáis, vayan. Cuando + future reference requires subjunctive. Note: vaya, vayamos are also nosotros/usted imperative forms.

quizQuestion:
Ojalá {___} a la fiesta.
(I hope they go to the party.)
sentenceTranslation: I hope they go to the party.
explanation: vayan — present subjunctive of ir (ellos/ellas/ustedes). Ojalá always requires subjunctive. ir subjunctive: vaya, vayas, vaya, vayamos, vayáis, vayan.

quizQuestion:
Espero que {___} pronto.
(I hope you come soon.)
explanation: vengas — present subjunctive of venir (tú). vengo (yo) → drop -o → veng- + subjunctive: venga, vengas, venga, vengamos, vengáis, vengan. After espero que, subjunctive required.

quizQuestion:
Espero que {___} ayudarme.
(I hope you can help me.)
sentenceTranslation: I hope you can help me.
explanation: puedas — present subjunctive of poder (tú). poder has a stem change: pued- (stem changes e→ue). pueda, puedas, pueda, podamos, podáis, puedan (note: nosotros/vosotros keep the -o- stem).

quizQuestion:
Es posible que {___} venir.
(It's possible that he can come.)
sentenceTranslation: It's possible that he can come.
explanation: pueda — present subjunctive of poder (él/ella/usted/yo). Es posible que requires subjunctive. poder subjunctive stem: pued- (stem change e→ue except nosotros/vosotros).

quizQuestion:
Espero que {___} la respuesta.
(I hope you know the answer.)
sentenceTranslation: I hope you know the answer.
explanation: sepas — present subjunctive of saber (tú). saber is irregular: sepa, sepas, sepa, sepamos, sepáis, sepan. The irregular stem sep- comes from sé (yo present indicative). After espero que, subjunctive required.

quizQuestion:
No quiero que le {___} nada.
(I don't want you to say anything to him.)
sentenceTranslation: I don't want you to say anything to him.
explanation: digas — present subjunctive of decir (tú). digo (yo) → drop -o → dig- + subjunctive: diga, digas, diga, digamos, digáis, digan. No quiero que requires subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Quiero que {___} ahora.
(I want you to leave now.)
sentenceTranslation: I want you to leave now.
explanation: salgas — present subjunctive of salir (tú). salgo (yo) → drop -o → salg- + subjunctive: salga, salgas, salga, salgamos, salgáis, salgan. Quiero que requires subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Es importante que {___} atención.
(It's important that you pay attention.)
sentenceTranslation: It's important that you pay attention.
explanation: pongas — present subjunctive of poner (tú). pongo (yo) → drop -o → pong- + subjunctive: ponga, pongas, ponga, pongamos, pongáis, pongan. Es importante que requires subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Ojalá {___} participar.
(I hope they want to participate.)
sentenceTranslation: I hope they want to participate.
explanation: quieran — present subjunctive of querer (ellos). querer has stem change e→ie: quiera, quieras, quiera, queramos, queráis, quieran (nosotros/vosotros keep -e- stem). Ojalá requires subjunctive.
